children.text:
YOU MOVE.
YOU EARN MONEY FOR CHARITY.
OVER $2M EARNED SO FAR.
“Charity Miles makes me feel stronger, couragous, unstoppable!”
“I love that I can make a daily impact for great causes.”
“Charity Miles has become the passion behind my training.”
“Charity Miles is my anchor. I do 7 Charity Miles every day.”
“It doesn’t take a huge effort to make a huge difference.”
